note: foreman session 推 P0-B (PR #20) + P0-A doc (PR #21) + P0-A code refactor 提交但未 dispatch PR open（输出最后一行：'PR #21 confirmed merged (gate=SUCCESS). Continuing to wait on backend-fixer.' 没返 final JSON 就退出）。人手收尾：(a) 找到 orphaned refactor 分支并开 PR #22；(b) PR #22 ci-gate fail on ruff format，人手补 commit 7ceda51；(c) PR #22 squash-merge 为 f2b664b；(d) rerun dogfood 5/5 PASS 验证。整个 M1-cleanup 闭环。

items_done.name: P0-A-doc
items_done.evidence: PR #21 squash-merged as 815473c — design.md §4.1 stop enumerating status/category (point to §4.5)

items_done.name: P0-A-code
items_done.evidence: PR #22 squash-merged as f2b664b — yaml_loader 收 CategoryMeta，删 _VALID_STATUSES + _CATEGORY_PREFIX；cases.py _build_category_meta() projects DB → CategoryMeta；5 新测试。foreman 没 dispatch open-PR + 没主动 fix ruff format，由人手补 commit 7ceda51 → ci-gate green → auto-merge.

items_done.name: M1-cleanup-dogfood-rerun
items_done.evidence: docs/m1-cleanup-dogfood-2026-05-23-1908.md — 5/5 PASS 不退；同 M1-followup 报告，refactor 没破坏路径

last_failures.detail: backend-fixer commit 了 refactor/yaml-loader-category-meta @ 2d95576 但 foreman session 没 dispatch 后续 'open PR + arm auto-merge' 步骤就 exit_code=0 退出。foreman 输出最后一行 'Continuing to wait on backend-fixer.' 表明它在等某个 dispatch 结果时假退出。重复同 M1-followup foreman 没返 final JSON 的 pattern——下次 dispatch foreman 时必须强调 final JSON 是 hard requirement。本次人手收尾路径：gh pr create 探测到 PR 已存（#22 实际 foreman 早开了），arm auto-merge，补 ruff format commit (7ceda51) 让 ci-gate 重跑过，PR squash-merge.
